data.title: XLM expected to reach $0.47 in 2 weeks on improved technical setup, potentially breaking above $0.42 resistance.
data.description: According to recent technical analysis, Stellar (XLM) is anticipated to reach a price target of $0.47 within a two-week timeframe. The analysis suggests that a potential breakout above the $0.42 resistance level could ignite bullish momentum, pushing the price towards new highs for the year.

data.title: TRX price may hit $0.38 in 2 weeks despite headwinds. Analysts cautiously optimistic, foreseeing rally from bearish trend.
data.description: Analysts are predicting a potential rally for TRX, with the price forecasted to reach the $0.38 resistance level. Despite the current bearish momentum signals, experts remain cautiously optimistic about the future of TRON, highlighting a positive outlook for the cryptocurrency.
